system.description: Gun parts are generic firearm components that allow you to make repairs or modifications to any gun. With the right know-how, you can also use them to create your own weapon. Guns can be broken down with a Gunsmithing check to get a number of gun parts, 6 for machine guns, 2 for handguns, and 4 for everything else. Failure will result in a number of scrap equal to the Load of the firearm.
